# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change in one short paragraph.

## What Changed

-

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint:md`
- [ ] `npm run lint:yaml`
- [ ] `npm run validate:digest-rules -- --format json`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`

## User-Visible Validation

- [ ] No user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] Real terminal reproduction was executed for the affected flow
- [ ] Visible command output or screenshots were captured when needed

## Risk Notes

- [ ] No secrets, webhook URLs, or tokens were added to code, logs, docs, or examples
- [ ] Workflow, release, and branch-protection implications were reviewed
- [ ] Docs were updated when behavior changed
